title: Ethos crop_element v1 contract inventory
description: Source-only pre-alpha Milestone D inventory for the crop_element v1 source-bound CLI/Python contract. This validates inventory shape and vocabulary; Node, MCP, hosted, sandbox-backed, and foreign-adapter crop behavior remain explicitly blocked.
